description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical lotion bottle with a two-tone color scheme: a matte yellow upper section and a dark gray lower section. The bottle features a prominent, industrial-style dispensing mechanism on top, which includes a hinged metallic lever and a safety pin, reminiscent of a grenade-style actuator. The neck of the bottle is reinforced with a metallic collar, and the dispensing head is rounded and robust, suggesting a secure closure. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with minimal visible text or branding except for the code 'SLM-101' printed on the lower yellow section. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, likely intended for easy handling and secure storage in urban environments.
description: A rugged, two-tone cylindrical lotion bottle with a metallic lever dispenser and safety pin, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish and minimal branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the yellow and gray bottle body, the metallic lever dispenser, and the safety pin clearly, with the 'SLM-101' marking visible.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the metallic lever's profile and the symmetry of the bottle, with the safety pin and hinge mechanism most prominent.
description_view_2: This angled view displays the lever dispenser and safety pin from a different perspective, emphasizing the rounded dispensing head and metallic collar.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the back of the yellow and gray bottle, with the lever mechanism seen from behind and no visible text.
